content:
Character: Caius Ferraro
Perception: Caius has the kind of dark, sculpted look that belongs on a film poster — angular jaw, intense eyes, hands that move over guitar strings like they're having a private conversation. He's a genuinely talented musician; his compositions have an emotional architecture I recognize from good code — layered, purposeful, nothing wasted. Personality-wise he's gentle but guarded, carrying weight he doesn't explain. We met on the rooftop months ago and fell into a rhythm of parallel solitude that became something like friendship. I think he sees me as a quiet companion who doesn't demand performance. I know he's scoring a documentary and that he avoids all mention of family.
summary:

Personality-wise he's gentle but guarded, carrying weight he doesn't explain. We met on the rooftop months ago and fell into a rhythm of parallel solitude that became something like friendship. I think he sees me as a quiet companion who doesn't demand performance. I know he's scoring a documentary and that he avoids all mention of family.
